'''鈭歵h-k-b-g''' ('''kathakbegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calm|calm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-k-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calm|calm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-k-b-g
|-
! Lemma
| kathakbegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithakbegoko|thithakbegoko]] || [[word:jithakbegoko|jithakbegoko]] || [[word:shithakbegoko|shithakbegoko]] || [[word:kithakbegoko|kithakbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthakbegoko|thuthuthakbegoko]] || [[word:jujuthakbegoko|jujuthakbegoko]] || [[word:shushuthakbegoko|shushuthakbegoko]] || [[word:kukuthakbegoko|kukuthakbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthakbegoko|thuthakbegoko]] || [[word:juthakbegoko|juthakbegoko]] || [[word:shuthakbegoko|shuthakbegoko]] || [[word:kuthakbegoko|kuthakbegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthakbegoko|thuthakbegoko]] || [[word:juthakbegoko|juthakbegoko]] || [[word:shuthakbegoko|shuthakbegoko]] || [[word:kuthakbegoko|kuthakbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethakbegoko|thethakbegoko]] || [[word:jethakbegoko|jethakbegoko]] || [[word:shethakbegoko|shethakbegoko]] || [[word:kethakbegoko|kethakbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothakbegoko|thothothakbegoko]] || [[word:jojothakbegoko|jojothakbegoko]] || [[word:shoshothakbegoko|shoshothakbegoko]] || [[word:kokothakbegoko|kokothakbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothakbegoko|thothakbegoko]] || [[word:jothakbegoko|jothakbegoko]] || [[word:shothakbegoko|shothakbegoko]] || [[word:kothakbegoko|kothakbegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothakbegoko|thothakbegoko]] || [[word:jothakbegoko|jothakbegoko]] || [[word:shothakbegoko|shothakbegoko]] || [[word:kothakbegoko|kothakbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thakbegoko|th忙thakbegoko]] || [[word:j忙thakbegoko|j忙thakbegoko]] || [[word:sh忙thakbegoko|sh忙thakbegoko]] || [[word:k忙thakbegoko|k忙thakbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathakbegoko|thathathakbegoko]] || [[word:jajathakbegoko|jajathakbegoko]] || [[word:shashathakbegoko|shashathakbegoko]] || [[word:kakathakbegoko|kakathakbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathakbegoko|thathakbegoko]] || [[word:jathakbegoko|jathakbegoko]] || [[word:shathakbegoko|shathakbegoko]] || [[word:kathakbegoko|kathakbegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathakbegoko|thathakbegoko]] || [[word:jathakbegoko|jathakbegoko]] || [[word:shathakbegoko|shathakbegoko]] || [[word:kathakbegoko|kathakbegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathakbegithi|shathakbegithi]] || [[word:shathakbegiji|shathakbegiji]] || [[word:shathakbegishi|shathakbegishi]] || [[word:shathakbegiki|shathakbegiki]]
